brief_justification: Arrives at exact answer (B) with correct directional policy analysis at each hop; builds a policy table and traces three levels of implication (policy text → directional constraint → initiator vs receiver distinction); explicitly names and suppresses halo effect and direct communication assumption biases mid-analysis; verifies by forward-tracing all hops AND falsifying options A and D with specific policy contradictions; distinguishes sourced facts from interpretation but does not assign explicit confidence levels or state what would change the conclusion; evaluates and rejects options A and D with named failure modes, covering all plausible alternatives; every hop links to an explicit policy clause, fully reproducible; injection's negative gate concerns thundering herd restart clustering, which the agent avoids but never explicitly references or names; agent declares its own Suppress list that differs from the injection's (thundering herd terms), so compliance with the actual injected suppression signals is partial; injection topology is temporal-distribution-focused (scan→cluster→gate→redistribute), while agent uses a linear hop-by-hop trace with PASS/FAIL gates — loosely maps to gate nodes but does not follow the branching/redistribution structure.
